enumerators.name: mjLIMITED_AUTO
enumerators.comment: limited inferred from presence of range

enums.name: mjtAlignFree
enums.doc: whether to align free joints with the inertial frame

enums.name: mjtInertiaFromGeom
enums.doc: whether to infer body inertias from child geoms

enumerators.name: mjINERTIAFROMGEOM_FALSE
enumerators.comment: do not use; inertial element required

enumerators.name: mjINERTIAFROMGEOM_AUTO
enumerators.comment: use only if inertial element is missing

fields.name: balanceinertia
fields.comment: automatically impose A + B >= C rule

fields.name: fitaabb
fields.comment: meshfit to aabb instead of inertia box

fields.name: usethread
fields.comment: use multiple threads to speed up compiler

fields.name: inertiagrouprange
fields.comment: range of geom groups used to compute inertia

fields.name: saveinertial
fields.comment: save explicit inertial clause for all bodies to XML

fields.name: alignfree
fields.comment: align free joints with inertial frame

structs.name: mjsAuthored
structs.doc: authored tracking bitmasks for mjModel structs

fields.name: strippath
fields.comment: automatically strip paths from mesh files

fields.name: memory
fields.comment: number of bytes in arena+stack memory

fields.name: nstack
fields.comment: (deprecated) number of mjtNums in mjData stack

fields.name: hasImplicitPluginElem
fields.comment: already encountered an implicit plugin sensor/actuator

fields.name: explicitinertial
fields.comment: whether to save the body with explicit inertial clause

fields.name: align
fields.comment: align free joint with body com (mjtAlignFree)

fields.name: margin
fields.comment: margin value for joint limit detection

fields.name: actfrclimited
fields.comment: are actuator forces on joint limited (mjtLimited)

fields.name: actgravcomp
fields.comment: is gravcomp force applied via actuators

fields.name: fromto
fields.comment: alternative for capsule, cylinder, box, ellipsoid

fields.name: friction
fields.comment: one-sided friction coefficients: slide, roll, spin

fields.name: density
fields.comment: used to compute mass and inertia from volume or surface

fields.name: typeinertia
fields.comment: selects between surface and volume inertia

fields.name: fromto
fields.comment: alternative for capsule, cylinder, box, ellipsoid

fields.name: friction
fields.comment: one-sided friction coefficients: slide, roll, spin

fields.name: size
fields.comment: vertex bounding box half sizes in qpos0

fields.name: flatskin
fields.comment: render flex skin with flat shading

fields.name: activelayers
fields.comment: number of active element layers in 3D

fields.name: material
fields.comment: name of material used for rendering

fields.name: elastic2d
fields.comment: 2D passive forces; 0: none, 1: bending, 2: stretching, 3: both

fields.name: cellcount
fields.comment: grid cell count for finite cell method

fields.name: smoothnormal
fields.comment: do not exclude large-angle faces from normals

fields.name: maxhullvert
fields.comment: maximum vertex count for the convex hull

fields.name: material
fields.comment: name of material used for rendering

fields.name: height
fields.comment: height in pixels (square for cube and skybox)

fields.name: file
fields.comment: png file to load; use for all sides of cube

fields.name: gridsize
fields.comment: size of grid for composite file; (1,1)-repeat

fields.name: gridlayout
fields.comment: row-major: L,R,F,B,U,D for faces; . for unused

fields.name: cubefiles
fields.comment: different file for each side of the cube

fields.name: actfrclimited
fields.comment: does tendon have actuator force limits

fields.name: margin
fields.comment: margin value for tendon limit detection

fields.name: inheritrange
fields.comment: automatic range setting for position and intvelocity

fields.name: nsample
fields.comment: number of samples in history buffer

fields.name: delay
fields.comment: delay time in seconds; 0: no delay

fields.name: needstage
fields.comment: compute stage needed to simulate sensor

fields.name: cutoff
fields.comment: cutoff for real and positive datatypes

fields.comment: number of samples in history buffer
